news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST META ETF (FBYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) FBYY was launched on Oct 21, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
